subject: A large segmented centipede with iridescent pink-magenta and teal armored plating, crawling across a dark forest floor strewn with leaves and twigs
description: A long, sinuous centipede dominates the frame, its segmented body shimmering in alternating bands of hot pink, magenta, and pale teal. Dozens of sharp, curved legs splay out beneath the body like rows of spines, giving the creature a bristly, predatory silhouette. The head is raised slightly, antennae forward, mandibles suggested in shadow. The creature crawls over a dim forest floor cluttered with dead leaves, broken twigs, and what may be smaller insects or carrion fragments. Lighting is low and greenish, with the centipede's body catching a wet, glossy highlight along its dorsal ridge. The overall palette is grim and lurid, evoking body horror and rotting undergrowth.
foreground: segmented centipede body, curved spike-like legs, scattered leaves and twigs
background: dim forest floor, decaying leaf litter, shadowed undergrowth
